# Fennecly

> Fennecly is an all-in-one platform to design, customize, and launch an online store in minutes — manage products, orders, shipping, and marketing from a single dashboard.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Fennecly's features for building and running an online store.
- [Themes](/themes): Browse storefront themes available on Fennecly.
- [iPhone guide](/iphone-guide): Step-by-step guide for managing a Fennecly store on iPhone.
- [Log in](/login): Sign in to a Fennecly account.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a new Fennecly account.
